rows.label: qev013302_MSG0001
rows.name:
Dammit! How long are these
guys gonna follow me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0002
rows.name:
Seriously, if you're my fans,
I wish you'd chase me with a
little more moderation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Oh, why are you here? Could it
be you're chasing after me too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev013302_SEL0011
rows.name: Agree just to keep things moving.

rows.label: qev013302_JNK0020
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev013302_SEL0021
rows.name: Inquire about the situation.

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0004
rows.name:
That's perfect, then use your power to
repel these approaching rivals in love![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0005
rows.name:
The answer to that comes after
defeating them! I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0006
rows.name:
That was some magnificent fighting!
I almost became a fan of yours![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0007
rows.name:
So what's the deal with running
into you here? Were you exploring
the wilderness too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Eh? Larry asked you to
come? That's a lifesaver![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0009
rows.name:
Our squad was annihilated by
the black Doll. Man, we didn't
last a single minute.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0010
rows.name:
So we abandoned our Dolls, scattered,
and ran, but then those guys showed up
and started chasing me persistently.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_JNK0030
rows.name: Verify

rows.label: qev013302_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Peter about the other survivors.

rows.label: qev013302_JNK0040
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev013302_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Peter about the black Doll.

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0011
rows.name:
I appreciate you worrying about
my comrades... Your consideration
makes my heart skip a beat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0012
rows.name:
The pursuing Verdes mostly
came after me, so I think
everyone else managed to escape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0013
rows.name:
Heh! I'll probably get yelled at by Captain
Corondas, but my policy is not to be
reckless against opponents I can't beat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0014
rows.name:
What, are you planning to fight that
thing? I don't know if you're brave
or reckless, but... amazing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0015
rows.name:
...But it's dangerous, that thing. We
attacked it three against one, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0016
rows.name:
We couldn't land a single bullet.
Its speed is unnatural...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Getting a radio transmission at
a time like this. Must be a love
call from our worrywart sub-leader.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0018
rows.name: ...Peter-san! Are you... there...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0019
rows.name: Hm... that voice, Bates![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0020
rows.name: Bates!? Hey! Where are you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0021
rows.name: ...Rugged... lava...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Ah... persistent bastards... black...
Peter-san... Where should I escape to![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0023
rows.name:
In a place like this... I can't even
tell... ...Peter-san! Peter-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0024
rows.name: Tch... The radio waves barely reach.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0025
rows.name:
It sounds like he's being chased
towards the Black Steel Continent,
but I've never been there before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0026
rows.name:
Hey, you're familiar with the
terrain around there, right? Tell
Bates where he can escape to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Dammit, it's no good here either... Right
now... I'm at the Emerian Battlegrounds...
where you can see O'rrh Sim Castle...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0028
rows.name: ... Which way should I... to escape...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_JNK0050
rows.name: Go West

rows.label: qev013302_SEL0051
rows.name: Tell Bates to head west.

rows.label: qev013302_JNK0060
rows.name: Go South[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_SEL0061
rows.name: Tell Bates to head south.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Understood... West,
then... Over there...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0031
rows.name: ...Did the transmission cut out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0035
rows.name:
...South... then... Understood...
Then I'll immediately...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0037
rows.name: ...Did the transmission cut out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0038
rows.name:
Sorry, please head to the Black Steel
Continent immediately and save him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0039
rows.name:
Unlike me, he's not fast at running
away. If he dawdles, he'll get caught.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0040
rows.name:
Okay? I'm counting on you. I
still have a mountain of things
I need to teach that greenhorn.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0041
rows.name:
I'll be fine now. I'll escape all
the way back to NLA like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013302_MSG0042
rows.name:
Right now, just focus on saving
Bates. Okay? I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]
